---
title = "Configuration"
---

*Calepin* is configured through `_calepin/config.toml` and TOML front matter.

## Project config

The `_calepin/config.toml` file controls site-wide settings:

```toml
title = "My Website"
target = "website"
output = "output"
```

## Sidebar navigation

Use `[[contents]]` sections with `include` to list pages in the sidebar:

```toml
[[contents]]
text = "Guides"
include = ["guides/*.qmd"]

[[contents]]
text = "Reference"
include = ["reference/cli.qmd", "reference/config.qmd"]
```

## Navbar

Navbar items support `include` for dropdown menus:

```toml
[[navbar.middle]]
text = "Guides"
include = ["guides/*.qmd"]
```

Or use explicit `children` for manual dropdowns:

```toml
[[navbar.middle]]
text = "More"
[[navbar.middle.children]]
text = "About"
href = "/pages/about.html"
```
